title: Forensic Reconstruction, Migration, and Adapter Parity
description: Reconstruct every governed state mutation and model-use decision, migrate legacy records through authorized transformations, and prove clean-room offline portability plus equivalent transaction behavior across filesystem and GitHub adapters.
acceptance_criteria: Every canonical state, transition, revocation, model-feedback package, receipt, rollback, and recovery action is reconstructable
Legacy records migrate only through explicit authorization, exact hashes, transformation lineage, and immutable receipts
Offline export, import, verification, and disaster-recovery drills pass in a clean environment
Filesystem and GitHub adapters exhibit equivalent idempotency, transaction-state, recovery, and audit behavior
Unsupported, corrupt, stale, or unauthorized schema migrations fail closed with forensic findings
